title: Construct brick and block structures and features
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Construct brick and block structures and features demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare work

pcs.text: Interpret site plans and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret site plans and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret site plans and specifications.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the quantity and quality of materials.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools, equipment and machinery required for construction work and check for safe operation.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Implement suitable control strategies for environmental problems relating to brick and block construction work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement suitable control strategies for environmental problems relating to brick and block construction work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement suitable control strategies for environmental problems relating to brick and block construction work.
